seoTitle: Gurrundah vs Guyong — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Gurrundah and Guyong. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Gurrundah and Guyong.
heading: Gurrundah vs Guyong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gurrundah, New South Wales and Guyong, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gurrundah has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Guyong (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Gurrundah or Guyong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gurrundah has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Guyong scores 20/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gurrundah scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Guyong scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gurrundah or Guyong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gurrundah has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
